---
title: "Presentations"
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  id: about-block
  image: "../img/my_image.jpg"
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:jose.p.arteta@gmail.com"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/josearteta
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jose-arteta/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/puentes_arteta
---

::: {#about-block}

:::
